articles.title: TreeSize won't renew perpetual-license support unless users subscribe
articles.content: "Current economic conditions" have shifted TreeSize's business model.
articles.titleZh: 除非用户订阅，否则TreeSize不会续订永久许可证支持
articles.contentZh: “当前经济状况”改变了TreeSize的商业模式。

articles.title: HP fined 1.4 billion rupees for “cartelization” of ink cartridges, toner, PCs
articles.content: Resellers threatened to ditch HP printing supplies for counterfeits.
articles.titleZh: 惠普因墨盒、碳粉、个人电脑的“卡特尔化”被罚款14亿卢比
articles.contentZh: 经销商威胁要放弃惠普打印用品的假冒产品。

articles.title: Now, even Russia's most elite hackers are using Clickfix to infect devices
articles.content: The social-engineering technique has primarily been a tool of financially motivated criminals.
articles.titleZh: 现在，即使是俄罗斯最精英的黑客也在使用Clickfix来感染设备
articles.contentZh: 社交工程技术主要是出于经济动机的犯罪分子的工具。

articles.title: Energy IPOs surge as investors hunt for ways to play AI boom
articles.content: Companies coming to market are raising money at fastest pace this century.
articles.titleZh: 随着投资者寻找发挥人工智能热潮的方式，能源IPO激增
articles.contentZh: 本世纪进入市场的公司正在以最快的速度筹集资金。

articles.title: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
articles.content: Amazon is launching an update to its Alexa Plus assistant that will allow it to connect to smart home devices in new ways. With the update, which is currently in preview, Alexa Plus can link up with tech from Bosch, Delta, Ecovacs, iRobot, Yale Home, Whirlpool, Tapo, Eufy, and others, while automatically routing requests to […]
articles.titleZh: Alexa Plus正在进行人工智能更新，以处理更复杂的指令
articles.contentZh: 亚马逊正在推出其Alexa Plus助手的更新，使其能够以新的方式连接到智能家居设备。通过目前正在预览的更新， Alexa Plus可以与Bosch、Delta、Ecovacs、iRobot、Yale Home、Whirlpool、Tapo、Eufy等公司的技术人员联系起来，同时自动将请求路由到[…]

articles.title: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
articles.content: Split between buying a smart calendar, a kitchen TV, a smart home hub, and a smart display? Amazon’s Echo Show 21 is all of those things in one, with a huge 21-inch screen. You can use it to control your smart lights, glance at recipes, watch TV shows, and more. Currently, Best Buy and Home […]
articles.titleZh: Echo Show 21是一个很棒的智能家居中心，折扣$ 80
articles.contentZh: 要购买智能日历、厨房电视、智能家居中心和智能显示器吗？亚马逊的Echo Show 21集所有这些功能于一身，配备巨大的21英寸屏幕。您可以使用它来控制智能灯、浏览食谱、观看电视节目等。目前，百思买和Home […]
